Tl.TTfa. 10S7(sr) nRW 3 111983 MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th December, 1990 G.S.R. 999(E).—Whereas the Central Govern- ment is satisfied that the use of the following drugs. namely :— 1. Fixed dose combination of sedatives/hypnotics/ anxiolytics with analgesic -antipyretics. 2. Fixed dose combination of pyrazinamide with other anti tuberculer drugs except combination of Pyrazinamide with Rifampiciu and INH as per recommended daily dose given below :— Drugs Minimum Maximum Rifampicin I N H Pyrazinamide 450 mg. 600 mg. 300 mg. 400 mg. 1000 mg. 1500 mg. 3. Fixed doso combination of histamine Hj— receptor antagonists with antacides excerpt for those combinations approved by Drugs Controller (India). 4. The Patent and Proprietary medicines of fixed dose combination of essential oils with alcohol having a n t i n g •jhevcr cur- percentage higher than 20% proof except prepara- tions given in the Indian Pharmacopoeia. 5. All Pharmaceutical preparations c." Chloroform exceeding 0.5 °'0 w/w or v/v vv is appropriate. do not have the therapeutic value claimed • ported Lo be claimed for them or for which there is no therapeutic justification and it is necessary ;md expedient in the public interest so to do; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powe-i* con- ferred by section 26A of the Drugs and CV'inetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in tliu noti- fication of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare No. G.S.R. No. 57K(E), dated the 23rd July, J 983 namely ; „ In the table appended to the said notification, after S.No.27 and the entries relating there to, the following serial numbers and enterjes shall be added, namely :- - (28) Fixed dose combination of Sedatives/h\« <^tjcs/ anxiolytics with analgesic—antipyretics. (29) Fixed dose combination of Pyrazinamide with other anti tuberculer drugs except combination of Pyrazinamide with Rifampicin and INH as per recommended daily dose given below : — Drugs Minimum Maximum Rifampicin 450 mg. 600 mg. INH 300 mg. 400 n,g. Pyrazinamide 1000 mg. 1500 frig (30) Fixed dose combination of histamine H2 —recep- tor antagonists with antacids except for those combinations approved by the Drugs Controfler, India. (31) The patent and proprietary medicines 01 iixed dose combinations of essential oils with ufcohol having percentage higher than 20% proof eicept preparations given in the Indian Pharmacopoeia. (32) All Pharmaceutical preparations containing Chloroform exceeding 0.5% w/w or v/v which- ever is appropriate. TNo. X-11014/3/88-DMS & PFA] BALBIR SINGH, Jt. Secy.
